holdings.infoBox: OPTZ is an equity ETF with a total of 340 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 4.01%, Penguin Solutions at 3.51%, Micron Technology at 2.95%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 2.90%, and Advanced Micro Devices at 2.85%.

overview.description: The Optimize Strategy Index ETF (OPTZ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Optimize Strategy index. The fund aims to track an index of broad market US equities, choosing large- and small-cap firms perceived to have strong quality and momentum characteristics. Weighting is tiered, using a modified market-cap method OPTZ was launched on Apr 23, 2024 and is issued by Optimize.
